title: Actor missing 'following' collection endpoint
description: The actor document does not include a 'following' field and GET /users/testuser/following returns 404. ActivityPub spec Section 5.4 requires actors to have a following collection. Mastodon and other implementations check for this during federation discovery. Discovered during conformance testing.
close_reason: Added /users/{username}/following endpoint (empty OrderedCollection) and following field in actor document
